svg.title: Free testing roadmap for Living Codebase project
svg.desc: Step by step guide - where to go, what to do, all free

g.text: codespaces mein eBPF limited ho sakta hai — CAP_BPF check karo
command: sudo bpftool prog list — agar chala toh set ho
option 2 — oracle cloud free tier (BEST — permanent free VM)
option 3 — local docker privileged (agar linux laptop hai)
--privileged = full kernel access, eBPF + ptrace dono milega

svg.text: exact commands — VM pe jaate hi chalaao

g.text: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y \
sudo bpftool prog list # verify eBPF works
* oracle card sirf verify ke liye — charge nahi hoga free tier mein
virtual/prepaid card bhi chalega — debit works
